name: healthcare_cold_chain_excursion_millhaven_auto_ben
premise: Medical records flagged conflicting allergy entries; anesthesia refuses to proceed without a single reconciled source of truth. forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Omar Berg must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Omar Berg do?
